key_insight: SciReasoner is a multimodal foundation model that turns structural information in proteins, molecules, and crystals into explicit tokens so it can both predict and explain structure-property relationships.
clinical_relevance: The work could support faster target interpretation and drug discovery workflows by improving protein function annotation and chemical reasoning, but it is a research model rather than a validated clinical tool.
method: Discretizes coordinates, topologies, and periodic connectivities into a unified structure-aware vocabulary.
Uses structural tokens as addressable evidence units during reasoning across proteins, small molecules, and inorganic crystals.
Trains and evaluates on multimodal benchmarks covering biology, chemistry, and materials science.
evidence_signal: Across 86 benchmarks, SciReasoner reports state-of-the-art performance on 67 tasks, and double-blind experts preferred or found its reasoning traces comparable to a frontier LLM in 98% of cases.
watch_item: Performance gains come from benchmark evaluation, so real-world deployment still needs external validation, domain-specific calibration, and careful checking of trace reliability.
paper_title: Accurate, Interdisciplinary and Transparent Structure-property Understanding with Deep Native Structural Reasoning
